title: EU strikes deal on new ‘ecocide’ rules to put polluters in jail – EURACTIV.com
description: European Union legislators reached agreement on Thursday (16 November) on a new directive that will see jail sentences of up to 10 years for the worst polluters and companies fined up to 5% of their global turnover.
